input.background: Exercise 17.4 considered a randomized trial of smoking cessation in which treatment with bupropion in combination with a nicotine patch was compared to use of a nicotine patch alone. The treatment group had success in 87 of 245 participants. The control group had successes in 40 of 244 participants.
input.question: Calculate the difference in proportions and a $95 \%$ confidence interval for $p_1- p_2$.

treatment_successes.description: Number of successes in the treatment group.

treatment_total.description: Total number of participants in the treatment group.

control_successes.description: Number of successes in the control group.

control_total.description: Total number of participants in the control group.
